src: 🗡️ Pokedex Compose demonstrates modern Android development with Jetpack Compose, Hilt, Coroutines, Flow, Jetpack (Room, ViewModel), and Material Design based on MVVM architecture.
ja: MVVM アーキテクチャに基づき、Jetpack Compose、Hilt、Coroutines、Flow、Jetpack（Room、ViewModel）、Material Designを用いたモダンなAndroid開発を実証するPokedex Composeアプリ。
